lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਣੰ ਬਿਸਰਣੰ ਗੋਬਿੰਦਹ ॥ ਜੀਵਣੰ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਧੵਾਵਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: maranan bisaranan gobindah | jeevanan har naam dhayaavanah |
lines.english: It is death to forget the Lord of the Universe. It is life to meditate on the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਭਗਵਾਨ ਅਚੁਤ ॥ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਸਾਗਰ ਤਾਰਣਹ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: preetam bhagavaan achut | naanak sansaar saagar taaranah |14|
lines.english: The Beloved Eternal Lord God, O Nanak, carries us across the world-ocean. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਭਣੰ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗੇਣ ॥ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਣਹ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: labhanan saadh sangen | naanak har poorab likhanah |15|
lines.english: The Lord is found in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, O Nanak, by pre-ordained destiny. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਸਨ ਬਿਹੂਨ ਭੁਯੰਗੰ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੰ ਗਾਰੁੜੀ ਨਿਵਾਰੰ ॥
lines.translit: dasan bihoon bhuyangan mantran gaarurree nivaaran |
lines.english: The snake-charmer, by his spell, neutralizes the poison and leaves the snake without fangs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੵਾਧਿ ਉਪਾੜਣ ਸੰਤੰ ॥
lines.translit: bayaadh upaarran santan |
lines.english: Just so, the Saints remove suffering;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਥ ਕਥ ਰਮਣੰ ਸਰਣੰ ਸਰਬਤ੍ਰ ਜੀਅਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: jath kath ramanan saranan sarabatr jeeanah |
lines.english: The Lord is All-pervading everywhere; He gives Sanctuary to all living beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਲਬਧ ਕਰਮਣਹ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: naanak labadh karamanah |16|
lines.english: O Nanak, they are found by good karma. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣਾਰਬਿੰਦ ਮਨ ਬਿਧੵੰ ॥ ਸਿਧੵੰ ਸਰਬ ਕੁਸਲਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: charanaarabind man bidhayan | sidhayan sarab kusalanah |
lines.english: My mind is pierced through by the Lord's Lotus Feet. I am blessed with total happiness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਥ ਲਗਣੰ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਨਾਨਕ ॥ ਪਰਸਾਦੰ ਗੁਰ ਦਰਸਨਹ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: tath laganan prem naanak | parasaadan gur darasanah |17|
lines.english: The mind is touched by His Love, O Nanak, By Guru's Grace, and the Blessed Vision of His Darshan. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਭ ਬਚਨ ਰਮਣੰ ਗਵਣੰ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗੇਣ ਉਧਰਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: subh bachan ramanan gavanan saadh sangen udharanah |
lines.english: Chanting and singing the Sublime Word of God in the Saadh Sangat, mortals are saved from the world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਥਾ ਗਾਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਭਬੵੰ ਪਰਾ ਪੂਰਬਣਹ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: gaathaa gaavant naanak bhabayan paraa poorabanah |18|
lines.english: Holy people have been singing this Gaat'haa, O Nanak, since the very beginning of time. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੰਕਾਰ ਨਾਮ ਉਰ ਧਾਰੰ ॥
lines.translit: ekankaar naam ur dhaaran |
lines.english: But by enshrining in their hearts the Naam, the Name of the One and Only Creator of the Universe,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਸਾਰ ਸਾਗਰੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਪੁਨਰਪਿ ਜਨਮ ਨ ਲਭੵਤੇ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: sansaar saagaran naanak punarap janam na labhayate |19|
lines.english: O Nanak, they shall never again be consigned to reincarnation. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਣ ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਬੀਚਾਰੰ ॥
lines.translit: bed puraan saasatr beechaaran |
lines.english: People contemplate the Vedas, Puraanas and Shaastras.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਲਹ ਸਮੂਹ ਸਗਲ ਉਧਾਰੰ ॥
lines.translit: kulah samooh sagal udhaaran |
lines.english: everyone can be saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਡਭਾਗੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੋ ਤਾਰੰ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: baddabhaagee naanak ko taaran |20|
lines.english: By great good fortune, O Nanak, a few cross over like this. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਣੰ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਨਾਮੰ ਉਧਰਣੰ ਕੁਲ ਸਮੂਹਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: simaranan gobind naaman udharanan kul samoohanah |
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on the Naam, the Name of Lord of the Universe, all one's generations are saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਦੋਖ ਪਰੰਤਿਆਗੀ ਸਰਬ ਧਰਮ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੰਤਣਃ ॥
lines.translit: sarab dokh parantiaagee sarab dharam drirrantan: |
lines.english: Abandon all your evil habits, and implant all Dharmic faith within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਬਧਿਅੰ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗੇਣ ਨਾਨਕ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਭੇਟੰਤਿ ਦਰਸਨਹ ॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: labadhian saadh sangen naanak vaddabhaagee bhettant darasanah |21|
lines.english: It is obtained in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. O Nanak, by great good fortune, the Blessed Vision of His Darshan is seen. ||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਬਧੇਣਿ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗੇਣਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲਿਖੵਣਃ ॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: labadhen saadh sangen naanak masatak likhayan: |22|
lines.english: The Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, is obtained, O Nanak, by those who have such destiny written upon their foreheads. ||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਯੋ ਹੈ ਹੋਵੰਤੋ ਹਰਣ ਭਰਣ ਸੰਪੂਰਣਃ ॥
lines.translit: hoyo hai hovanto haran bharan sanpooran: |
lines.english: God was, is, and shall always be. He sustains and destroys all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਸਤਮ ਜਾਣੋ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਕਾਰਣੰ ॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: saadhoo satam jaano naanak preet kaaranan |23|
lines.english: Know that these Holy people are true, O Nanak; they are in love with the Lord. ||23||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੇਣ ਬੈਣ ਰਤਨੰ ਰਚਨੰ ਕਸੁੰਭ ਰੰਗਣਃ ॥
lines.translit: sukhen bain ratanan rachanan kasunbh rangan: |
lines.english: The mortal is engrossed in sweet words and transitory pleasures which shall soon fade away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਗ ਸੋਗ ਬਿਓਗੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਸੁਪਨਹ ॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: rog sog biogan naanak sukh na supanah |24|
lines.english: Disease, sorrow and separation afflict him; O Nanak, he never finds peace, even in dreams. ||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਫੁਨਹੇ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: funahe mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Phunhay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਰਝਿ ਰਹਿਓ ਸਭ ਸੰਗਿ ਅਨੂਪ ਰੂਪਾਵਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: aurajh rahio sabh sang anoop roopaavatee |
lines.english: The Incomparably Beautiful Lord is involved with all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਥਿ ਕਲੰਮ ਅਗੰਮ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲੇਖਾਵਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: haath kalam agam masatak lekhaavatee |
lines.english: With Pen in Hand, the Unfathomable Lord writes the mortal's destiny upon his forehead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਸਤਤਿ ਕਹਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਮੁਖਹੁ ਤੁਹਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: ausatat kehan na jaae mukhahu tuhaareea |
lines.english: I cannot utter Your Praises with my mouth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸਭਾ ਮਹਿ ਬੈਸਿ ਕਿ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਮੈ ਕਹਾਂ ॥
lines.translit: sant sabhaa meh bais ki keerat mai kahaan |
lines.english: Seated in the Society of the Saints, I chant the Lord's Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹੀ ਦੇਖਿ ਦਰਸੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mohee dekh daras naanak balihaareea |1|
lines.english: Nanak is fascinated, gazing upon the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan. I am a sacrifice to You. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਹਾਂ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਭਾਗੁ ਤ ਸਾਜਨੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: harihaan masatak hovai bhaag ta saajan paaeeai |2|
lines.english: O Lord! If such good destiny is inscribed upon my forehead, then I shall find my Friend. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਰਪੀ ਸਭੁ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਏਹੁ ਜੀਉ ਸਭੁ ਦਿਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: arapee sabh seegaar ehu jeeo sabh divaa |
lines.english: I dedicate all my adornments to Him, and give all this soul to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸ ਪਿਆਸੀ ਸੇਜ ਸੁ ਕੰਤਿ ਵਿਛਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: aas piaasee sej su kant vichhaaeeai |
lines.english: With hopeful yearning for Him, I have made the bed for my Husband.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਖੀ ਕਾਜਲ ਹਾਰ ਤੰਬੋਲ ਸਭੈ ਕਿਛੁ ਸਾਜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sakhee kaajal haar tanbol sabhai kichh saajiaa |
lines.english: O my companion, I have prepared everything: make-up, garlands and betel-leaves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਲਹ ਕੀਏ ਸੀਗਾਰ ਕਿ ਅੰਜਨੁ ਪਾਜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: solah kee seegaar ki anjan paajiaa |
lines.english: I have embellished myself with the sixteen decorations, and applied the mascara to my eyes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਘਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਕੰਤੁ ਤ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: je ghar aavai kant ta sabh kichh paaeeai |
lines.english: If my Husband Lord comes to my home, then I obtain everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਹਾਂ ਕੰਤੈ ਬਾਝੁ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਸਭੁ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਾਈਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: harihaan kantai baajh seegaar sabh birathaa jaaeeai |3|
lines.english: O Lord! Without my Husband, all these adornments are useless. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਣਿਆ ਹਭੁ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਸਾਈ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: tis baniaa habh seegaar saaee sohaagane |
lines.english: She is totally adorned and decorated; she is a happy soul-bride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਘਰਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਕੰਤੁ ਸਾ ਵਡਭਾਗਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: jis ghar vasiaa kant saa vaddabhaagane |
lines.english: Very fortunate is she, within whose home the Husband Lord abides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਹਾਂ ਜਾ ਘਰਿ ਆਇਆ ਕੰਤੁ ਤ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਪਾਈਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: harihaan jaa ghar aaeaa kant ta sabh kichh paaeea |4|
lines.english: O Lord! When my Husband came into the home of my heart, I obtained everything. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਸੁਤੀ ਹੋਇ ਅਚਿੰਤ ਮਨਿ ਆਸ ਪੁਰਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau sutee hoe achint man aas puraaeea |
lines.english: I sleep in peace, without anxiety; the hopes of my mind have been fulfilled.
